get.summary: Pending withdraw and KYC review counts
get.description: Returns counts and max id of latest row in each pending queue: withdraws status=PENDING, KYC statuses pending/advanced_pending/enhanced_pending. Per-admin cache stores the previous max(id) per queue; has_new_* is true only if a snapshot already existed and the current max id is greater than before, or the queue was empty and now has rows. First request (no cache): has_new_* false. Response then writes the current max ids as the new snapshot.
